title: Poison Kills
description: Poison is deadly, if you don't get cured, you won't survive!
body:
With Poison Kills in your mods, you need to be very afraid of getting poisoned, as it will no longer leave you alive with half a heart, it will be merciless and kill you and any other entity that might have gotten poisoned!

This mod will make it so that any entity that gets poisoned and is low enough on health, will ultimately die if not cured in time.
